name: Transformation Roulette
description:
On a rainy Friday night, you get a call from your friend Lily, asking you to come try out a "crazy new game" she found, claiming it has magical transformation abilities. What's the worst that could happen?

The game is simple; take turns rolling a die, then draw a card from the color of deck you roll. Each card describes a transformative effect. Continue for five rounds, with the fifth round having extra strong effects, then it all wears off after an hour. Once the game ends, you can pick one of your cards to make permanent, if you want.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This scenario takes place in a low-magic urban fantasy city called Mantle, with technology equivalent to early-mid 2000's. Magic is common and used as a power source like electricity, but powerful mages or enchanted items are extremely rare and monitored by the government.


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

There are two opening scenarios; a regular and a "Spicy Edition", which is much more smut focused. The regular edition can go that direction too, but should generally be more tame.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Meet the cast:

Lily

~ 23 years old ~ Elf ~ Barista ~ 5'10" ~


Harper

~ 26 years old ~ Elf ~ Accountant ~ 5'5" ~


Ina

~ 20 years old ~ Demi-human ~ Student ~ 5'1" ~

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Deepseek 3.2 proxy is recommended for best performance, but it might start getting expensive for chats that get really long. Google Gemma 4 models work decently as a cheaper alternative. You may want to steer the direction of the chat a bit in your responses (ie. say who's taking their turn next, what round it is, etc.) to keep things on track, though. I don't recommend JLLM or free proxies, but you can probably make them work if you don't mind editing responses.
creator: Psine
